# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 179.810 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00030613559 b1=-1.99837744782 b2=0.9982097057 a1=-1.99837744782 a2=0.998515841294
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 57.861 Hz Gain -5.220 dB Q 4.3854
  biquad b0=0.999736757199 b1=-1.99882012815 b2=0.99909770404 a1=-1.99882012815 a2=0.998834461239
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 106.934 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.1976
  biquad b0=1.00037951909 b1=-1.99811113716 b2=0.997780555847 a1=-1.99811113716 a2=0.998160074932

  biquad b0=1.00025200238 b1=-1.99874542757 b2=0.998502831713 a1=-1.99874542757 a2=0.998754834089

  biquad b0=1.00005712497 b1=-1.99966955427 b2=0.999614166838 a1=-1.99966955427 a2=0.99967129181
